operator_guidance.safe_next_step: Inspect route mounting/config or discover a supported non-admin project-secret path without printing or persisting secrets.
operator_guidance.stop_line: If the project-secret route remains unresolved, stop before any write/retrieve parity, IRC session-manager mutation, cross-project autorouting, customer/public delivery, dispatch, reputation, payment, GPS/raw metadata, or worker-doctrine claim.

resolution_gates.evidence: source fixture records Swagger advertisement and two 404 runtime probes
no mounted admin route or supported non-admin project-secret path has been identified yet
secret path remains unresolved and no secret value was printed or persisted
blocked until a scoped project Bearer secret exists in memory

rejected_paths_for_this_slice.reason: source observation already recorded 404 at both known advertised path shapes
prior contract discovery proved project Bearer auth is required

safe_next_paths.success_condition: identify why the advertised admin project route is not mounted or reachable in the running API
identify a supported local project-secret creation path without logging the resulting secret

path_resolution_decision.stop_line: If the project-secret route remains unresolved, stop before any write/retrieve parity, IRC session-manager mutation, cross-project autorouting, customer/public delivery, dispatch, reputation, payment, GPS/raw metadata, or worker-doctrine claim.
